notes: This file is owned by Agent 01 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.
Preferred workflow: add/update only the current sprint+round; do not rewrite past rounds.

sprint_meta.notes: WK33: ground texture, scatter brightness+SEEN FOW tune, graveyard lair mesh, economy prefabs marketplace+blacksmith (+trading_post optional).

pm_status_summary.summary: WK33 kickoff round complete; see wk33_sprint_closeout for final signoff.

wk33_r0_kickoff.pm_universal_prompt:
You are being activated for sprint **wk33-terrain-lair-economy-prefabs**, round **wk33_r0_kickoff**.

1) Open and follow the full sprint spec (your Agent section has the step list):
   `.cursor/plans/wk33_3d_sprint_plan_6e616891.plan.md`
   Also align with `.cursor/plans/master_plan_3d_graphics_v1_5.md` (Phase 1–2).
2) Find your assignment: PM hub `.cursor/plans/agent_logs/agent_01_ExecutiveProducer_PM.json` → `sprints[\"wk33-terrain-lair-economy-prefabs\"].rounds[\"wk33_r0_kickoff\"].pm_agent_prompts[YOUR_NUMBER]`
   (your numbered prompt restates the same work as the plan; if anything conflicts, follow the plan + ask PM.)
3) Do not commit `models_compressed/`. Jaimie runs the Kenney model assembler with Agent 15 as the plan states.
4) When you finish: update your agent log under `.cursor/plans/agent_logs/`, then run the gates your role requires (code changes: `python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` from repo root; if you changed assets or manifest: `python tools/validate_assets.py --report`).
5) Report back: files touched, exact commands + exit codes, and blockers.

Sprint in one line: **tiling grass ground texture**, **~20% lighter** trees/grass scatter + **explored (SEEN) FOW** balance, **lair = Graveyard kit** static mesh in `assets/models/environment/`, **marketplace + blacksmith** prefab JSONs (optional **trading_post**).

pm_send_list_minimal.optional: 13 (patch notes only if you cut a test build)
pm_send_list_minimal.rationale: 12 low: manifest+validate. 9 medium: art direction for lair+buildings+ground. 15 high: kitbash+exports. 03 high: Ursina+prefab table+brightness. 5 low: footprint consult. 10+11 low: perf spot + final gates.

Log exit code in `agent_12` hub log.

Deliver: (1) one Graveyard kit choice for the shared **lair** mesh, (2) short silhouette/mood notes for **marketplace** and **blacksmith** for Agent 15, (3) sign-off that `floor_ground_grass.png` is OK as world-scale tiled albedo. Log in agent_09 JSON.
pm_agent_prompts.15: WK33 (ModelAssembler): Do the **Agent 15** block in the WK33 plan. Export a single **lair** mesh into `assets/models/environment/` (name it so Agent 03 can wire `lair` per plan). Build `marketplace_v1.json` and `blacksmith_v1.json` (optional `trading_post_v1.json`) under `assets/prefabs/buildings/`; use `prefab_texture_override_standard.md` for flat kits. pm_agent_prompts.03: WK33 (Tech): Do the **Agent 03** block in the WK33 plan. `game/graphics/ursina_renderer.py`: base quad uses tiled `floor_ground_grass.png`; ~20% lift on env scatter tints; tune SEEN FOW vs ground after Jaimie spot-check; wire lair to new graveyard file; add `marketplace`/`blacksmith` to `_PREFAB_BUILDING_TYPE_TO_FILE` if needed. `python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` MUST pass. Log in agent_03 JSON.
pm_agent_prompts.05: WK33 (Gameplay): Do the **Agent 05** block. Compare each new prefab `footprint_tiles` to `config.py` BUILDING_SIZES; do not change sim footprints without PM. If prefab vis overshoots, file notes for Agent 15. Log in agent_05 JSON.

pm_agent_prompts.11: WK33 (QA): After code settles, run `python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` and if assets changed `python tools/validate_assets.py --report`; both must PASS. Log in agent_11 JSON.
pm_agent_prompts.13: Optional: draft short player-facing bullets for this sprint if a build goes to testers. No version bump unless Jaimie says so.

round_meta.commit_message: 3D Graphics Phase 2.5: Market, Blacksmith, Farms, Trading Post, and Lairs + grass added.

pm_status_summary.summary: WK33 is officially closed. Tiling grass ground texture, scatter/SEEN FOW tuning, Graveyard lair static mesh, marketplace + blacksmith + trading_post prefabs (plus construction-stage JSONs and midsprint Kenney assembler scale hotkeys -/=) are accepted. Jaimie playtested Ursina FPS personally; no separate Agent 10 formal run. Agent 11 final gate re-run not required per PM; agent logs note PM acceptance.

pm_accepted_deliverables: Ground: floor_ground_grass.png on base terrain quad; env scatter brightness and FOW tuning hooks (Agent 03 + config).
Lair: assets/models/environment/lair.glb (Graveyard crypt) wired for all lair types (Agent 15 + 03).
Economy prefabs: marketplace_v1, blacksmith_v1, trading_post_v1 and build_% variants; farm-related work as landed with Agent 15/03.
Tools: assets manifest + validate_assets; model_assembler_kenney scale nudge (WK33 midsprint).
Gameplay: Agent 05 footprint audit PASS 2x2 for new prefabs.

01.next_action: Offer next sprint options; reopen WK33 only on regression report.

10.note: Jaimie confirmed FPS acceptable in playtest; PM closed sprint without a separate Agent 10 log round.

11.note: PM accepted Jaimie verification; formal re-gate in agent_11 log not required.

sprint_meta.notes: Midsprint follow-up: scale nudge for Kenney Kit Assembler (unblocks farm prefab fix). - / = hotkeys, Kenney pack multiplier contract unchanged.

pm_status_summary.summary: Midsprint landed with Agent 12+11; folded into WK33_sprint_closeout. Assembler -/= scale nudge for selected pieces is accepted.

r0_implement.pm_universal_prompt:
You are being activated for **wk33-midsprint-assembler-scale-hotkeys**, round **r0_implement** (follow-up to main WK33 work).

1) **Spec (read first):** `.cursor/plans/assembler_scale_hotkeys_177ca989.plan.md` — implement exactly what it describes; the Kenney **logical** `scale` in JSON is separate from `pack_extent_multiplier_for_rel` on the Entity in the tool.
2) **PM hub path:** `.cursor/plans/agent_logs/agent_01_ExecutiveProducer_PM.json` → `sprints[\"wk33-midsprint-assembler-scale-hotkeys\"].rounds[\"r0_implement\"].pm_agent_prompts[YOUR_NUMBER]`
3) **Code:** `tools/model_assembler_kenney.py` only (no game/ or config changes unless the plan’s follow-up file lists them).
4) **Gates:** Agent 12: run `python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` from repo root after code changes. Agent 11: final PASS confirmation.
5) **Log:** your agent log JSON with what changed, commands, and exit codes.

**Goal:** With a **selected** placed piece, **-** (minus) makes the piece **slightly smaller** and **=** (equals) **slightly larger**; **Shift** = finer step; display scale in status. Preserve `entity.scale = logical_scale * pack_extent_multiplier_for_rel(model_path)`.

pm_send_list_minimal.rationale: 12 (MEDIUM) implements assembler hotkeys+contract. 11 (LOW) final qa_smoke gate after 12; no 03/15 unless a bug is found.

pm_agent_prompts.12: Assembler scale midsprint (Agent 12 Tools). Implement `.cursor/plans/assembler_scale_hotkeys_177ca989.plan.md` in **one file** `tools/model_assembler_kenney.py`: add `-` shrink / `=` grow on **selected** piece, Shift=fine, multiplicative uniform nudge, clamp, `apply` logical `PlacedPiece.scale` then re-`entity.scale = (*pf, *pf, *pf)` with existing `pack_extent_multiplier_for_rel`. Update module Controls docstring and `_refresh_status` to show scale. Numpad `subtract` optional. Do not bake `pf` into JSON. Run: `python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick`. Log in agent_12 JSON with evidence.
pm_agent_prompts.11: After Agent 12: run `python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` (from repo root). If anything unexpected in tools touched, note PASS/FAIL in agent_11 log.

sprint_meta.notes: WK34: nature scatter 4× scale-up; Ranger/Rogue/Wizard construction stages; Guardhouse and Temple full prefab sets; Cleric hiring; building LoS; neutral spawn rebalance; Marketplace loitering reduction; deprecated building roster cleanup.

pm_status_summary.summary: WK34 is closed and accepted. Final 3D model pass for pre-v1.5: nature props scaled up, new/updated prefabs and construction stages, Temple + Clerics, building LoS, spawn/pacing tuning, and deprecated building roster cleanup. Gates pass (qa_smoke + validate_assets).

pm_accepted_deliverables: Nature scatter scale-up (~4×) for readability in Ursina.
Prefab sets: Ranger Guild rework + build_20/build_50; Rogue/Wizard build_20/build_50; Guardhouse full set; Temple full set.
Temple is canonical buildable type; can hire Clerics.
Fog-of-war: all constructed player buildings reveal a 3-tile radius (excluding castle, neutrals, and lairs).
Neutral spawns: farms at half rate; first food stands prefer near Marketplace; shopping durations reduced to curb loitering.
Deprecated buildings removed from build roster (keys/hotkeys/UI), with legacy-safe guards where needed.

01.next_action: Cut v1.5.0 release: bump version metadata + finalize CHANGELOG + tag release commit.

sprint_meta.notes: Architecture Refactor Stage 1 kickoff: introduce SimStateSnapshot + GameEngine.build_snapshot(), then migrate UrsinaRenderer to consume snapshot (no self.engine references). Two rounds: R1 snapshot+tests, R2 renderer migration + manual parity.

pm_status_summary.focus: Create frozen SimStateSnapshot, add GameEngine.build_snapshot(), and add tests validating snapshot immutability + engine snapshot shape. No Ursina renderer changes in R1.

pm_status_summary.summary: WK36 Stage 1 is closed and accepted. SimStateSnapshot introduced + engine.build_snapshot() added; UrsinaRenderer fully decoupled from engine (no self.engine refs) and consumes snapshot passed from UrsinaApp. Automated gates pass and human parity checks confirm normal building placement + fog-of-war + mock provider AI behavior.

pm_accepted_deliverables: New snapshot contract: game/sim/snapshot.py (frozen SimStateSnapshot).
Engine API: GameEngine.build_snapshot() returns SimStateSnapshot.
Renderer decoupling: game/graphics/ursina_renderer.py has zero self.engine references; update(snapshot) consumes snapshot fields.
Ursina wiring: game/graphics/ursina_app.py builds snapshot each frame and passes it to renderer.update(snapshot).
Tests: tests/test_renderer_snapshot_contract.py includes snapshot immutability + build_snapshot validity tests.

pm_evidence.agent_03: agent_03_TechnicalDirector_Architecture.json → wk36-refactor-stage1-snapshot-decouple rounds wk36_r1_snapshot_and_tests + wk36_r2_renderer_migration: pytest PASS, qa_smoke PASS, validate_assets PASS.

pm_next_actions: Proceed to Stage 2 planning (GameEngine decomposition into SimEngine + PresentationLayer) using the master plan Stage 2 section, now that Stage 0+1 test safety net exists.

01.next_action: Plan Stage 2 kickoff sprint (SimEngine + PresentationLayer split) with careful two-round sequencing and explicit backward-compat shims.

pm_send_list_minimal.rationale: Stage 1 is engine snapshot + Ursina renderer boundary only. Avoid cross-domain conflicts.

sprint_meta.notes: Architecture Refactor Stage 2 kickoff: split GameEngine into SimEngine (pure sim) + PresentationLayer (camera/display/UI/render/audio/VFX wrapper). Two rounds: R1 scaffold + move sim-owned init, R2 move update loop + convert sim→HUD direct calls to EventBus HUD_MESSAGE + presentation subscription.

pm_status_summary.focus: Create game/sim_engine.py and move sim-owned initialization out of the God-object engine. Wire PresentationLayer to own self.sim and forward properties so existing code keeps working.

pm_feature_requests.title: Introduce SimEngine and wire PresentationLayer wrapper
acceptance: New file game/sim_engine.py defines SimEngine (no UI/camera/display/audio/VFX).
PresentationLayer (in game/engine.py) owns self.sim and forwards key entity/system properties for backward compatibility.
python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick PASS.

asks: Follow the WK37 plan file: .cursor/plans/wk37_stage2_simengine_split_1bc48a29.plan.md (Round WK37-R1).
Create game/sim_engine.py with SimEngine scaffolding and move sim-owned __init__ state from GameEngine into SimEngine, one block at a time.
In game/engine.py, wire PresentationLayer to create self.sim = SimEngine(...) and add property forwarding (engine.buildings -> sim.buildings, etc.) so existing code continues to run.
Run gates: python -m pytest tests/ and python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick.
acceptance_criteria: No functional behavior change intended; only relocation + wiring.

pm_status_summary.focus: Move update loop + fog-of-war + get_game_state/build_snapshot into SimEngine. Replace sim→HUD direct calls with EventBus HUD_MESSAGE events; PresentationLayer subscribes and calls hud.add_message().

gates.manual_smoke: python main.py --no-llm and python main.py --renderer ursina --no-llm must run without regressions.

pm_feature_requests.title: Move sim update loop into SimEngine and bridge HUD messages via EventBus
acceptance: SimEngine owns update(dt) and sim sub-methods; PresentationLayer tick_simulation delegates to sim.
SimEngine no longer calls hud.add_message() directly; instead emits HUD_MESSAGE events.
PresentationLayer subscribes to HUD_MESSAGE and forwards to hud.add_message().
get_game_state() and build_snapshot() live on SimEngine; PresentationLayer delegates for compatibility.
python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick PASS.

asks: Follow the WK37 plan file: .cursor/plans/wk37_stage2_simengine_split_1bc48a29.plan.md (Round WK37-R2).
Move setup_initial_state, _update_fog_of_war, update() and _update_* helpers into SimEngine.
Convert sim→HUD direct calls (notably _route_combat_events and try_hire_hero) into EventBus HUD_MESSAGE events. PresentationLayer subscribes and calls hud.add_message().
Move get_game_state() + build_snapshot() into SimEngine; PresentationLayer delegates.
Run gates: python -m pytest tests/ ; python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick ; python tools/validate_assets.py --report.
Manual smoke: python main.py --no-llm ; python main.py --renderer ursina --no-llm ; python main.py --renderer ursina --provider mock.

pm_status_summary.summary: WK37 Stage 2 is closed and accepted. SimEngine + PresentationLayer split landed (R1 scaffold, R2 sim update loop + HUD_MESSAGE bridge). Additional midsprint rounds R3/R4 were driven by repeated Jaimie Ursina playtesting with Agent 03 to preserve fog-of-war parity (dedupe sim vs presentation fog paths) and improve guild fog-edge readability via config-tunable extra guild vision radius. Automated gates pass; perf consult PASS; human playtest signoff recorded in Agent 10/03 logs.

game/engine.py: PresentationLayer-style GameEngine wrapper with self.sim + property forwarding + HUD_MESSAGE subscription.
game/events.py: HUD_MESSAGE event type for sim→HUD toasts.
Fog parity: R3 removes duplicate/stale engine fog path; SimEngine remains authoritative.
